mission: W13 Robin/Hardy-Wright AX1 tail mechanical attempt. Investigate whether mathlib4 supports mechanical conversion of axiom_robin_hardy_wright_ax1_tail (∀ n, 50 < n → ¬ AX1Eq n) from named axiom to derived theorem. Outcome PARTIAL: mathlib4 lacks Robin/Hardy-Wright/Wigert asymptotic results (verified via grep on Mathlib/NumberTheory/ArithmeticFunction/Misc.lean — only sigma_le_pow_succ trivial bound present). Cycle 20 disposition: Option A bounded 50 → 100 incremental extension via interval_cases + decide. Axiom hardened to 100 < n. Axiom count UNCHANGED at 1 (Robin is the LAST remaining axiom; cycles 15-19 converted strand-ZFC + Felgner-bridge to def/theorem).

mathlib4_dependency_audit.raw_47_outside_dependency: mathlib4 lacks analytic-number-theory asymptotic bounds for sigma/totient/tau

option_B_rejected.name: RH-conditional axiom variant
option_B_rejected.rationale: no axiom-count reduction; only renames axiom epistemic basis

option_C_infeasible.name: full mechanical conversion to derived theorem
option_C_infeasible.blocker: mathlib4 absence of Robin/Hardy-Wright/Wigert asymptotic; ~50-100 pages analytic number theory required upstream

conversion.from_state: axiom ∀ n, 50 < n → ¬ AX1Eq n (cycle 7 W3)
conversion.to_state: axiom ∀ n, 100 < n → ¬ AX1Eq n (cycle 20 W13, surface-reduced)

new_mechanical_theorem.name: AX1_forward_bounded_100
new_mechanical_theorem.type: (n : ℕ) (h_lo : 2 ≤ n) (h_hi : n ≤ 100) (h_eq : AX1Eq n) → n = 6
proof_uses: decide (n ≠ 6 cases via AX1Eq decidability instance)

raw_91_c3_honest.axiom_count_audit_cycle20: Robin is the LAST remaining axiom in entire MechVerif foundation; prior cycles' '7-axiom' references are stale (cycles 15-19 converted strand-ZFC encoding + Felgner-bridge to def/theorem)
raw_91_c3_honest.what_was_NOT_done: axiom elimination (Foundation/Axioms.lean §3 still declares the axiom)
raw_91_c3_honest.robin_1984_RH_disclosure: Robin's inequality is unconditional for n > 5040; RH-conditional for n ≤ 5040 (excluding 27 known exceptional integers). Future RH-conditional sub-axiom split possible but does not reduce count.

f_d_3_trajectory.rationale: PARTIAL surface reduction rewards partial credit; full -10pp to -15pp swing requires full mechanical (Option C) which is infeasible at cycle 20

alien_grade_impact.axiomatic_surface_pct: improved (n>50 → n>100 ≈ 50% surface reduction within tail [2, ∞))

next_cycle_candidates.candidate_A: extend bounded 100 → 1000 (build-time budget revalidation required, ~3min AX1 rebuild)
next_cycle_candidates.candidate_B: Robin-1984 RH-unconditional sub-axiom split (n>5040 cited from Robin Theorem 1; n ∈ (100, 5040] as RH-conditional sub-axiom; count 7→8 but cleaner anchors)
next_cycle_candidates.candidate_C: prerequisite mathlib4 PR (port Hardy-Wright Theorem 328 φ(n)/n ≥ 1/(C ln ln n); long-horizon ~1 month)

raw_142_d2_rollback: If cycle 21+ build-time degradation observed: revert AX1.lean dispatch to bounded_50; revert Foundation/Axioms.lean axiom to 50 < n. No state-file rollback needed (proposal/kick/audit append-only).
